title: STUDIES IN THE CYCLOPENTANE SERIES. PART II EXPERIMENTS TOWARDS THE SYNTHESIS OF WIELAND'S C13-ACID IN PROPER STEREOCHEMICAL FORMS
author: PHANINDRA CHANDRA DUTTA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A method for the synthesis of 3-ethoxy-ß-(1 :5-dimethylhexyl)-4-methylvaieric acid is described.
steps_raw: A method for the synthesis of 3-ethoxy-ß-(1 :5-dimethylhexyl)-4-methylvaieric acid is described.
